base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of msx_characters_full_set — a character (npc) from 1986 dragon quest. MSX character sprites — hero (4-dir × 6 armor-tiers × 2-frame), princess, king, soldier, townspeople. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: MSX character sprites — hero (4-dir × 6 armor-tiers × 2-frame), princess, king, soldier, townspeople; ~40 total sprites in 248×120 canvas. Deathbringer-ripped 1986
